title: AGT cedar advice payload
description: AGT D3.3 cedar advice annotation. Cedar policy authors attach this JSON object as the `advice` annotation on a permit policy. The cedar dispatcher extracts it from the cedar response and translates it into a verdict-shaped JSON object that the runtime normalizes through `normalize_policy_output`. Advice that does not match this schema MUST fail closed with `runtime_error:policy_output_invalid`. A transform advice whose `transform.path` is outside `$policy_target` MUST fail closed with `runtime_error:transform_target_forbidden` per AGT D1.1.

verdict.description: Decision the advice escalates the cedar permit to. The `deny` and `allow` decisions never come from advice: cedar's own authorization result drives those.

reason.description: Optional policy supplied reason string. MUST NOT use the reserved `runtime_error:` prefix.

message.description: Optional human readable message the caller MAY surface to the user.

path.description: AGT D1.1 transform path. MUST be rooted at `$policy_target`. The runtime applies the replacement only to the policy target; the snapshot, annotations, projected tool, and host state are untouched.

value.description: New JSON value to set at `path`. May be any JSON type, including `null`.

transform.description: AGT D1.1 single target replacement body. Required when `verdict` is `transform`; forbidden when `verdict` is `warn` or `escalate`.
